name: Email Writer
description: Generate professional emails for various scenarios with appropriate tone and structure
author: Yuna Cheng

inputs.name: scenario
inputs.description: Email scenario: business, job-application, client, internal, other

inputs.name: purpose
inputs.description: The core purpose/goal of the email

inputs.name: details
inputs.description: Key information to include in the email

inputs.name: tone
inputs.description: Tone: formal, friendly, concise (auto-detect if omitted)

outputs.name: email
outputs.description: The complete email with subject line, body, and sign-off
